Senior Developer Position - Elite Team

We are building a rockstar development team and need young, energetic ninja coders who can work the long hours required in our startup environment.

Must-Have Qualifications:
- Recent CS graduate from a top university
- Digital native who codes in his sleep
- Able-bodied and healthy - no accommodations available
- Native English speaker with perfect communication
- Willing to work 60+ hour weeks and weekends

Our brotherhood of developers is seeking someone who fits our culture: smart guys who can handle pressure, stay late, and socialize with the team after hours. This role requires physical presence in office - remote work is for people who can't commit.

The ideal candidate is a young man straight out of Stanford or MIT, someone from a good family who understands professional expectations. We're not interested in older workers set in their ways or anyone requiring special treatment.

Benefits include beer Fridays and a salary commensurate with elite university pedigree.
